concerns.text: FR-001 through FR-011 lack explicit anchoring to user stories. While content appears to cover US-1/US-2/US-3, no inline references (e.g., 'See US-1', 'Anchored to User Story 2') exist. Add traceability markers to each FR to prevent orphaned requirements.
SC-001 through SC-005 lack explicit anchoring to user stories. SC-001/SC-005 clearly relate to US-1 (benchmark comparison), but no inline references exist. Add traceability markers to each SC.
FR-005 (logging for reproducibility) has no explicit story anchor. While it supports US-1's reproducibility needs, add 'See US-1' or similar to confirm anchoring.
FR-009 (missing modality handling) has no explicit story anchor. While it relates to US-2's edge cases, add 'See US-2' or similar to confirm anchoring.
